title: SubscriptionOffer
description: A subscription offer represents special pricing for a subscription, such as a free trial or introductory price.

packageName.description: The package name of the parent app.

productId.description: The product ID of the parent subscription.

basePlanId.description: The base plan ID the offer is associated with.

offerId.description: The unique identifier for this offer.

state.description: The current state of the offer.

phases.description: The pricing phases for this offer. Each phase defines a pricing period with its own duration and price.
